## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, holiday plans, and SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Holiday Content Strategy:** Pause publishing during low-traffic holiday weeks (Thanksgiving, Christmas) to avoid wasted effort. Instead, use the content buffer to schedule occasional posts for consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [**"AI for Math" Article Risk:** The article's top rank for the broad query "AI for math" attracts student traffic, creating a high bounce rate risk that could hurt its SEO. The team will analyze queries to confirm the issue before deciding on a fix.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [**Internal Linking Project:** The project is delayed due to Martha's unexpected move but will proceed in batches of \~10 articles per week once she is settled.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [**November SEO Performance:** Performance is strong, on track with last month. The "AI for math" article is the top organic traffic driver and a top-cited LLM source, highlighting its high value but also its risk.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Query Analysis

  - [**November Performance:** On track for similar or slightly lower performance vs. October.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [**Top Non-Branded Queries:**](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [`magic school` (competitor)](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [`guided notes generator`](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [`AI for math`](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [`AI unblocked for school`](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
      - [`math AI`](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [**Top LLM-Cited Blogs:** Two recently refreshed/new articles are already top-cited, showing the site's strong authority in the LLM space.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [**GSC Update:** Google Search Console will soon filter branded queries (including misspellings), simplifying non-branded query analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### "AI for Math" Article Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The article's top rank for the broad query "AI for math" attracts significant student traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [**Risk:** High bounce rates from students seeking personal help could signal low intent to Google, risking the article's high rank.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [**Dilemma:** The article is a key asset, driving the most organic traffic and serving as a top LLM citation source.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [**Potential Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [**Create new, teacher-specific content:** Avoids modifying the high-performing original.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [**Add on-page student CTA:** Redirects students to relevant resources or encourages them to ask their teacher about SchoolAI.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Reposition for students:** Aligns content with the future student-facing product.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### Holiday Content Strategy

  - [**Context:** GrowthX is creating a content buffer for the holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [**Decision:** Pause publishing during low-traffic weeks (Thanksgiving, Christmas) to avoid wasted effort.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Google Search Console data from last year shows a massive traffic drop during these periods.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [**Action:** Use the content buffer to schedule occasional posts for consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

  - [**Internal Linking Project:**](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Status:** Delayed.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Reason:** Martha's unexpected military-related move.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [**Plan:** Will proceed in batches of \~10 articles per week once Martha is settled.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [**Reddit Project:**](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
      - [**Status:** In the pipeline; Megan expects to share an update in the next two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [**Tucker's Call Video:**](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
      - [**Status:** Jenn requested the video from Nikki.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)

  - [**Nathan:** Analyze "AI for math" queries to inform strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/vNE2jDDQDzhAojCAY6-BfBrh5RuotGX1?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
